howItWorks.intro: Converting oven recipes to air fryer settings is simple. Air fryers use rapid convection heating in a compact space, so they cook faster and at lower temperatures than conventional ovens.
rules: Check food a few minutes early — every air fryer runs slightly different
howItWorks.outro: This converter applies these rules automatically and includes food-specific adjustments for common items. It works with all air fryer brands including Ninja, Cosori, Instant Pot, Philips, and more.

faq.question: How do I convert oven temperature to air fryer?
faq.answer: Reduce the oven temperature by 25°F (about 15°C) for your air fryer. For example, if a recipe calls for 400°F in the oven, set your air fryer to 375°F. This works because air fryers circulate hot air more efficiently in their smaller cooking chamber.

faq.question: How do I convert oven time to air fryer time?
faq.answer: Reduce the oven cooking time by about 20%. For example, if a recipe calls for 30 minutes in the oven, cook for about 24 minutes in the air fryer. It's always a good idea to check your food a few minutes before the timer goes off.

faq.question: Why does an air fryer cook faster than an oven?
faq.answer: Air fryers use rapid air circulation (convection) in a compact space, which heats food more efficiently than a traditional oven. The smaller cooking chamber means hot air reaches the food faster and more evenly, producing crispier results in less time.

faq.question: Do I need to preheat my air fryer?
faq.answer: Most air fryers benefit from 2-3 minutes of preheating. This helps achieve crispier results, especially for foods like chicken wings, fries, and anything breaded. However, preheating is optional for most recipes and some models preheat automatically.

faq.question: Does this converter work with all air fryer brands?
faq.answer: Yes. The oven-to-air-fryer conversion rule (reduce temp by 25°F, reduce time by 20%) is universal and works with all brands including Ninja, Cosori, Instant Pot, Philips, COSORI, Chefman, Gourmia, and more. Individual results may vary slightly by model.

faq.question: Can I convert frozen food instructions for the air fryer?
faq.answer: Yes, but frozen foods need different adjustments. Start with the package instructions as your baseline, reduce temperature by 25°F, but keep the time the same or add 2-3 minutes. Frozen foods need extra time because the air fryer must thaw and cook simultaneously.

sections.title: What Is the Air Fryer Converter?
sections.body: The Air Fryer Converter is a free online tool designed for home cooks and chefs who need quick, accurate calculations in the cooking and food preparation space. By entering your oven temperature, oven cooking time, you get instant results including air fryer temperature, air fryer time. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting air fryer temperature right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In cooking and food preparation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by home cooks and chefs worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to perfect your recipes with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your oven temperature and need to find the right air fryer temperature. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Oven Temperature
howToSteps.description: Type or select your oven temperature in the field provided. Use the most accurate value available for best results.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Oven Cooking Time (minutes)
howToSteps.description: Type or select your oven cooking time in the field provided. Use the most accurate value available for best results.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your air fryer temperature, air fryer time. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your oven temperature before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
Run the calculator with different values to compare scenarios and find the optimal approach for your situation.
Pay attention to both air fryer temperature and air fryer time — they work together to give you the full picture.
Bookmark this page for quick access next time you need to perfect your recipes.
If you're unsure about your oven cooking time, start with a conservative estimate and adjust from there.
